chunks.text: ORDER Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No. 1569 of 2007 Date Order with signature of Judge For examination of parties/Settlement of Issues. 15.08.2023 Agha Zafar Ahmed, Advocate for the Plaintiff. Mr. Muhammad Abdullah, Advocate for the Defendant. Ms. Sarha Rasheed Advocate on behalf of MICADAR............. Plaintiff and Defendant’s Counsels are present. They submit that the matter could not be mediated on account of fee of the mediators. Representative of MICADAR submits that apart from the mediators nominated by the Court there may be other empanelled mediators who could offer mediator services on pro-bono basis. The proposal appears to be reasonable. Parties may select mediator of their choice pursuant to the directions of this Court dated 01.06.2023. MICADAR’s representative files statement dated 15.08.2023 which is taken on record. Office is directed to flag the same as “MICADAR 1st Statement dated 15.08.2023”. MICADAR may proceed further in the matter with the parties. The Bench appreciates MICADAR efforts to assist the Court in promotion of mediation. To come up in the third (3rd) week of September 2023. J U D G E
